note: Scoped review by fresh maker-not-checker agents; 1 confirmed (minor), fixed and verified by a green battery (272 tests). The 'marker has no accessible name' finding was correctly refuted (Leaflet 1.9.4 defaults alt='Marker'); we still added alt={location.name} as a meaningful-name improvement. Security: keyless OSM tiles, no secrets; full sweep at G7.
fixedFindings: Out-of-range map click no longer silently dropped: now surfaces a calm inline status message (mapClickOutOfRange, no exclamation marks) while keeping the prior location (FR-MAP-03 reject scenario)
Marker alt set to the location name (meaningful accessible name beyond Leaflet's generic default)
